title: ジャパンCの後に・そして、タイマンへ

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeeeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So that's how it is...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon, Queen of the Amazons, claims a
stunning victory at the Japan Cup!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, that was an incredible run! It was so
amazing, it gave me goosebumps.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look at Narita Brian... Her expression is
super intense...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I did it, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks! But man, there's really only one
opponent for me—

We're interrupted before Hishi Amazon can finish
her sentence.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ama.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Brian! Great timing. I was just talking about
you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Today, I brought my A game, and fought past
some real tough racers. But winning just didn't
feel like enough.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's not the same without you. You're the only
rival for me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll be waiting for ya, so get on my level already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah, no need to tell me twice.

The glint in Narita Brian's eyes is as keen and
fierce as a beast's.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...All this time, I've been chasing my sister's
shadow. Waking or dreaming, her back is all I can
see.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But I've never been able to catch up—and that
divide between us has stoked a feverish blaze in
me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Today... I felt that fire watching you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I will definitely surpass you the next time we
meet. I won't let you win the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oooh! So that's how you feel!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I knew it!
Next up is finally the Arima Kinen!
